title: DesignContextPack
description: A budget-bounded, relevance-selected slice of a design context. Produced by the design compiler's prompt adapter: only the items most relevant to a query that fit the declared budget are present, in a deterministic order, so the same `(context, query, budget)` always yields a byte-identical pack.

body.description: Rendered prompt body: one item `text` per line, deterministic order.

design_system_id.description: The design system the pack was selected from.

items.description: Selected items, most relevant first then by reference for stable ties.

max_chars.description: Maximum number of characters the pack body may contain (char budget).

max_items.description: Maximum number of items the pack may contain (item budget).

query.description: The lowercased relevance query the pack answers.

total_chars.description: Total characters across all selected items (`<= max_chars`).

DesignContextItem.description: A single relevant design datum selected into a context pack: a stable `ref` (token path or component id), the rendered `text` the model sees, and the integer `char_cost` that line contributes to the pack budget. Deterministic and self-describing so a pack can be diffed and pinned.

char_cost.description: Number of characters `text` contributes to the budget (`text.len() + 1` for the trailing newline), so budgets are exact and platform-neutral.

text.description: One-line rendering of the datum included in the pack body.

DesignContextItemKind.description: What kind of design datum a [`DesignContextItem`] carries. Tokens and components are selected into a [`DesignContextPack`] by relevance.
